sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65427" key="megalo/koros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεγᾰλό-κορος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<sense id="n65427.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κόρη</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">111</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>) <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with large pupils</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg007:54" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.54</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
